name: e2e-automated-customer-service
description: Backend-first AI customer support BPO platform.

scripts.lint: pnpm -r lint && uv run --frozen --project ai python -m compileall -q ai/runtime ai/evals
scripts.test:integration: pnpm --filter @support/db test:integration && pnpm --filter @support/api test:integration && pnpm --filter @support/workers test:integration
scripts.test:py: uv run --frozen --project ai python -m unittest discover -s ai -p '*_test.py'
